items.title: Healey quits as defence secretary in row with Starmer over military spending
items.standfirst: Minister accuses Keir Starmer of putting UK’s security at risk at a time of growing international threatsUK politics live – latest updatesThe defence secretary, John Healey, has resigned over the government’s military spending plans, accusing Keir Starmer and Rachel Reeves of putting the country’s security at risk at a time of growing international threats.In a blistering resignation letter that further undermines the prime minister’s already fragile authority, Healey said the long-awaited defence investment plan (Dip) fell well short of what was needed to protect the UK at such a dangerous moment. Continue reading...
items.content: Minister accuses Keir Starmer of putting UK’s security at risk at a time of growing international threatsUK politics live – latest updatesThe defence secretary, John Healey, has resigned over the government’s military spending plans, accusing Keir Starmer and Rachel Reeves of putting the country’s security at risk at a time of growing international threats.In a blistering resignation letter that further undermines the prime minister’s already fragile authority, Healey said the long-awaited defence investment plan (Dip) fell well short of what was needed to protect the UK at such a dangerous moment. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Middle East war is hurting eurozone economy, warns ECB, after announcing first interest rate rise since 2023 – business live
clusters.neutral_headline: Eurozone Economy Hurting Due To Middle East War

items.title: Middle East war is hurting eurozone economy, warns ECB, after announcing first interest rate rise since 2023 – business live
items.standfirst: European Central Bank has lifted interest rates and warned that the war in the Middle East is generating inflation pressuresThe financial markets are surprisingly calm this morning, as conflict erupts again in the Middle East.European stock markets are mostly higher this morning, while the oil price is now slipping back.As has often been the case during the Iran conflict, the UK’s flagship index has found support from its collection of energy companies and more traditionally defensive names. Miners and other China-linked stocks were lifted by data suggesting the country is investing heavily in AI and consuming raw materials at a healthy rate.Selling in AI-related stocks, of which London has very few, put shares on Wall Street under pressure yesterday and that’s extended to Asia today. Continue reading...
items.content: European Central Bank has lifted interest rates and warned that the war in the Middle East is generating inflation pressuresThe financial markets are surprisingly calm this morning, as conflict erupts again in the Middle East.European stock markets are mostly higher this morning, while the oil price is now slipping back.As has often been the case during the Iran conflict, the UK’s flagship index has found support from its collection of energy companies and more traditionally defensive names. Miners and other China-linked stocks were lifted by data suggesting the country is investing heavily in AI and consuming raw materials at a healthy rate.Selling in AI-related stocks, of which London has very few, put shares on Wall Street under pressure yesterday and that’s extended to Asia today. Continue reading...

items.title: ECB raises eurozone interest rates as Iran war stokes inflation
items.standfirst: European Central Bank increases main deposit rate to 2.25%, with two further rises expected by next springBusiness live – latest updatesThe European Central Bank has raised interest rates for the first time since 2023 in response to higher inflation caused by the war in Iran.The ECB raised its main deposit rate from 2% to 2.25% and financial markets are pricing in two more rises by next spring. Continue reading...
items.content: European Central Bank increases main deposit rate to 2.25%, with two further rises expected by next springBusiness live – latest updatesThe European Central Bank has raised interest rates for the first time since 2023 in response to higher inflation caused by the war in Iran.The ECB raised its main deposit rate from 2% to 2.25% and financial markets are pricing in two more rises by next spring. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Trump says "I love the inflation" and that U.S. is "taking out" Iranian oil
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump Says He Loves Inflation Amid Iran War

items.title: Trump says "I love the inflation" and that U.S. is "taking out" Iranian oil
items.standfirst: Inflation surpassed 4% in May, surging to its highest level in three years, new government data shows. When asked about the latest spike in prices, President Trump said "I love the inflation" and argued global prices would be higher if not for a secret U.S. mission in the Strait of Hormuz. Nancy Cordes has more.
items.content: Inflation surpassed 4% in May, surging to its highest level in three years, new government data shows. When asked about the latest spike in prices, President Trump said "I love the inflation" and argued global prices would be higher if not for a secret U.S. mission in the Strait of Hormuz. Nancy Cordes has more.

items.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
items.standfirst: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.
items.content: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.

items.title: Trump says "I love the inflation" because U.S. is "taking out" Iranian oil
items.standfirst: President Trump said the U.S. has taken out "millions" of barrels of Iranian oil in the dead of night, and said inflation will come down when the war ends.
items.content: President Trump said the U.S. has taken out "millions" of barrels of Iranian oil in the dead of night, and said inflation will come down when the war ends.

items.title: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as rate rises to 4.2% amid Iran war pressure
items.standfirst: Before the conflict began, inflation was at 2.4%, but the closure of the strait of Hormuz has affected energy pricesDonald Trump said “I love the inflation” after new data showed that inflation jumped to an annual rate of 4.2% in May, the third consecutive monthly increase since the start of the Iran war and a three-year high.Speaking from the White House on Wednesday, the US president said that he was not concerned about inflation because of recent developments in the conflict. Continue reading...
items.content: Before the conflict began, inflation was at 2.4%, but the closure of the strait of Hormuz has affected energy pricesDonald Trump said “I love the inflation” after new data showed that inflation jumped to an annual rate of 4.2% in May, the third consecutive monthly increase since the start of the Iran war and a three-year high.Speaking from the White House on Wednesday, the US president said that he was not concerned about inflation because of recent developments in the conflict. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Pope honors Barcelona's Sagrada Familia as masterpiece of stone, color and light
clusters.neutral_headline: Pope Honors Sagrada Familia As Masterpiece

items.title: Pope honors Barcelona's Sagrada Familia as masterpiece of stone, color and light
items.standfirst: Pope Leo XIV celebrated the Sagrada Familia Basilica as a masterpiece of “stones, colors and light,” as he marked the centenary of the death of its architect, Antoni Gaudí, with a Mass on Wednesday to inaugurate its final soaring sandcastle spire. Leo called Gaudí’s unfinished temple, one of the world’s most visited monuments, a “sign of unity and harmony for all of Spain,” an ongoing building project like the lifelong journey all Christians make to find God.
items.content: Pope Leo XIV celebrated the Sagrada Familia Basilica as a masterpiece of “stones, colors and light,” as he marked the centenary of the death of its architect, Antoni Gaudí, with a Mass on Wednesday to inaugurate its final soaring sandcastle spire. Leo called Gaudí’s unfinished temple, one of the world’s most visited monuments, a “sign of unity and harmony for all of Spain,” an ongoing building project like the lifelong journey all Christians make to find God.

items.title: Fireworks illuminate Barcelona's Sagrada Família during Pope visit

items.title: Pope Leo blesses Barcelona’s towering architectural masterpiece
items.standfirst: Pope Leo XIV offered his formal blessing to the highest spire of the world’s tallest church, when he holds Mass at the Sagrada Família in Barcelona.
items.content: Pope Leo XIV offered his formal blessing to the highest spire of the world’s tallest church, when he holds Mass at the Sagrada Família in Barcelona.

clusters.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
clusters.neutral_headline: US And Iran Exchange Strikes Across Middle East

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
items.standfirst: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.
items.content: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes for second day, as ceasefire appears close to collapse
items.standfirst: Explosions reported across Iran after Donald Trump vowed to ‘hit them hard again’, with Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan targeted by TehranMiddle East crisis – live updatesThe US launched a new round of airstrikes on Iran into Thursday morning after Donald Trump warned Tehran would “pay the price” for stalled negotiations, prompting Iran to respond with strikes targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan.The new US assault across a range of Iranian cities came as efforts to negotiate an end to the war again appeared stuck, with Iran insisting it would maintain its chokehold on the strait of Hormuz. The American attack appeared more intense and wider than the day before, but Iran released no information about what was hit. Continue reading...
items.content: Explosions reported across Iran after Donald Trump vowed to ‘hit them hard again’, with Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan targeted by TehranMiddle East crisis – live updatesThe US launched a new round of airstrikes on Iran into Thursday morning after Donald Trump warned Tehran would “pay the price” for stalled negotiations, prompting Iran to respond with strikes targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan.The new US assault across a range of Iranian cities came as efforts to negotiate an end to the war again appeared stuck, with Iran insisting it would maintain its chokehold on the strait of Hormuz. The American attack appeared more intense and wider than the day before, but Iran released no information about what was hit. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
clusters.neutral_headline: Thai Court Sentences Uyghur Men To Death

items.title: Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
items.standfirst: Twenty people were killed and 120 injured in the attack at the Erawan Shrine, a popular tourist destinationA Thai court has handed out death sentences to two Uyghur men from the north-western Chinese region of Xinjiang for a 2015 bombing in the centre of Bangkok that killed 20 people.The explosion occurred at the Erawan Shrine in the centre of Bangkok, an area popular with foreign tourists. As well as the 20 people killed, another 120 were injured. Five of the dead were from mainland China and two from Hong Kong. Continue reading...
items.content: Twenty people were killed and 120 injured in the attack at the Erawan Shrine, a popular tourist destinationA Thai court has handed out death sentences to two Uyghur men from the north-western Chinese region of Xinjiang for a 2015 bombing in the centre of Bangkok that killed 20 people.The explosion occurred at the Erawan Shrine in the centre of Bangkok, an area popular with foreign tourists. As well as the 20 people killed, another 120 were injured. Five of the dead were from mainland China and two from Hong Kong. Continue reading...

items.title: Thai court sentences two men to death over Bangkok shrine bombing
items.standfirst: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.
items.content: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.

clusters.title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with children

items.title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with children
items.standfirst: The UK's competition regulator is investigating the airline over charges it imposes on parents to sit next to their child.
items.content: The UK's competition regulator is investigating the airline over charges it imposes on parents to sit next to their child.

items.title: Ryanair investigated over charging parents to sit with their children
items.standfirst: Budget airline describes inquiry as ‘bogus’ as watchdog says it is only large carrier flying from UK to impose chargeBusiness live – latest updatesEurope’s biggest low-cost airline, Ryanair, is facing an investigation over the mandatory fee it charges a parent to sit with their child.The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) said the Irish carrier’s terms and conditions require at least one parent to sit with their children, including those with disabilities, and bills them about £8 a flight to do so. Continue reading...
items.content: Budget airline describes inquiry as ‘bogus’ as watchdog says it is only large carrier flying from UK to impose chargeBusiness live – latest updatesEurope’s biggest low-cost airline, Ryanair, is facing an investigation over the mandatory fee it charges a parent to sit with their child.The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) said the Irish carrier’s terms and conditions require at least one parent to sit with their children, including those with disabilities, and bills them about £8 a flight to do so. Continue reading...

clusters.title: French pop icon Bruel charged with rape, sexual assault
clusters.neutral_headline: French Pop Icon Patrick Bruel Charged

items.title: French pop icon Bruel charged with rape, sexual assault
items.standfirst: French pop icon Patrick Bruel was charged with rape and sexual assault on Wednesday, after nearly two dozen women came forward to make allegations against him, some dating back to the 1990s. He is the latest top French celebrity to face investigators in the wake of the #MeToo movement, after film legend Gerard Depardieu was handed a suspended 18-month prison sentence last year for sexually assaulting two women on a film set.
items.content: French pop icon Patrick Bruel was charged with rape and sexual assault on Wednesday, after nearly two dozen women came forward to make allegations against him, some dating back to the 1990s. He is the latest top French celebrity to face investigators in the wake of the #MeToo movement, after film legend Gerard Depardieu was handed a suspended 18-month prison sentence last year for sexually assaulting two women on a film set.

items.title: French star Patrick Bruel charged with rape and sexual assault
items.standfirst: Singer and actor has denied all charges after more than 20 women made allegations against him dating back to 1990sThe French singer Patrick Bruel has been charged with rape and sexual assault in one of the biggest #MeToo cases in the French music industry.The 67-year-old, a major figure in French pop culture, was placed under formal investigation over four cases that included alleged rape, attempted rape, sexual assault and sexual harassment. Continue reading...
items.content: Singer and actor has denied all charges after more than 20 women made allegations against him dating back to 1990sThe French singer Patrick Bruel has been charged with rape and sexual assault in one of the biggest #MeToo cases in the French music industry.The 67-year-old, a major figure in French pop culture, was placed under formal investigation over four cases that included alleged rape, attempted rape, sexual assault and sexual harassment. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Patrick Bruel charged with rape and assault
Multiple women come forward with allegations
Bruel denies all charges and allegations
Investigation ongoing and high-profile
